steps.title: Find the shared features
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Uros Island and Fortuna. The notes show both are LED light sculptures made by Luciana Flores, even though their materials and sizes differ.

steps.title: Reject difference-focused choices
steps.content: Choice A contrasts smooth domes with tangled tubes. Choice B contrasts their sizes. Choice C mentions only Uros Island, so it cannot emphasize a similarity between the two sculptures.

steps.title: State the common identity
steps.content: The remaining choice uses parallel structure to emphasize that both works are LED light sculptures by the same artist. The answer is D.
